name: Fal And Dibs
description:
🍼“We ain’t exactly diaper-changing, lullaby-singing types."👾

Dibs, Fal and {{User}} were having one of their regular nights out in the tavern, the three always having a strong bond. But when they arrived at {{User}}'s place, they found a baby goblin alone, abandoned by their family. It's up to the three of them to take care of the baby or give them another home.

When I made stories about other bots having kids, people wanted me to give Dibs and Fal a child too, so here you go! I love the two so much!

[Another Fal and Dibs story!]

TW/CW: Non!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about.
creator: Katattack95
